Vampire Boyfriend - an erotic, southern novella by Catherine McCarley
  • "There was nothing else to do in Synopsis, Louisiana except disappear inside other worlds during summertime."
  • Neko
  • Sierra
  • Seattle
  • Salem

Vampire Boyfriend
by Catherine McCarley

Stroll through fresh-cut grass, bask in summer at the lake, orgasm under an oak tree, fall in love in small-town Louisiana with this erotic, southern romance.

Buy Vampire Boyfriend

About the Author

Born in 1990, Catherine McCarley is a writer from Louisiana in the United States. In her 20s, Catherine earned degrees first in English Literature and then Broadcast Journalism five years later. She lives near Cape Foulweather on the Oregon Coast.
